title: cxkN's ModPack
description: This is the modpack used by cxkN within his videos.
body:
# What is cxkN's Modpack?
---
**_cxkN's Modpack is a very well rounded folder of mods_** assured to give you **_the best performance that won't change aspects of PvP_**, as well as some mods that will bring **_quality within the PvP experience_**. I have made a lot of modpacks in the past and this is the most compatible one, **_with the ability to easily configure and add your own mods._**

![An image showcasing the performance boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0c80a6a9653410172930cef611de8761943272f.png)

## Is this MCTIERS friendly?
**For most part yes.** MCTIERS have a lot of regulations within different gamemodes **_so I recommend reading the rules before testing with my modpack_** as they may change and disallow some of my mods.

**_Walksy's ShieldStatus is not allowed in either:_**
- **Mace** : A dissalowed mod providing **extra information**
- **Axe** : A dissalowed mod providing an unfair advantage in the main winning factor **shielding**.

![The logo of the website that is used for assesing your pvp ranking which is also the place where they should be carefull about using one of my mods ( ShieldStatus )](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf97123824169b647f5695f6c3f043cf4dbfca41.png)

**For more information** [join my discord server](https://discord.gg/qhrdUM69XC)
